protein_name: Clathrin is the major protein of the polyhedral coat of coated pits and vesicles. Two different adapter protein complexes link the clathrin lattice either to the plasma membrane or to the trans-Golgi network. Belongs to the clathrin heavy chain family. Maximal levels in skeletal muscle. High levels in heart and testis. Low expression detected in all other tissues. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
